channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'It almost defied belief': here are the 5 best OnePlus phones ever, as the 'flagship killer' leaves the US and Europe
item.description: We're not going to get any more new OnePlus phones in the US and Europe, but we still have our memories.

item.title: AI-run 'utopias,' Moss in 2D and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Enjoy our weekend guide to the best indie games worth checking out.

item.title: Amazon a attendu la fin des soldes pour casser le prix de l’Apple Watch SE 3
item.description: Avec son Apple Watch SE 3, la marque à la pomme propose un produit complet à un prix abordable puisqu'elle peut se trouver pour moins de 220 euros du côté d'Amazon.

item.title: 4 Best Walking Pads for Small Spaces and Standing Desks (2026)
item.description: Our remote team clocked serious hours walking, working, and sometimes jogging to find the best under-desk treadmills for home offices and small spaces.

item.title: OpenAI will start notifying parents if their teen has been kicked off of ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI will send a notification to parents with linked teen accounts if their children have violated its policies around violence.

item.title: How to watch Fiji vs Scotland: FREE streams, TV channels for Nations Championship 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Fiji vs Scotland live streams – including for FREE – as the Nations Championship 2026 continues at Murrayfield.

item.title: Best speed camera detectors for UK drivers in 2026: dedicated GPS devices that help you stay on the right side of the law
item.description: The best speed camera detectors for avoiding costly fines in 2026

item.title: Feeling sticker shock in the produce aisle? Try these hacks to save money
item.description: Tomato prices have been in the headlines lately, but costs are soaring for fruits and vegetables across the board. From tomatoes and berries to lettuce and peppers, shoppers are feeling sticker shock in the produce aisle.

item.title: The Best Motion Sensors and Home Security Gadgets Without Cameras
item.description: If you prefer not to have cameras in and around your home, try one of these more private, WIRED-tested security devices.

item.title: Your Period Tracker Is (Probably) Spying on You
item.description: Plus: Russian cyberspies turn to infrastructure hacking, DHS repeatedly fails to realize it’d been hacked, a breach exposes an AI music generator’s scraping ways, and more.

item.title: France-Angleterre : comment voir le match pour la 3e place de la Coupe du monde 2026 en streaming ?
item.description: La France et l'Angleterre s'affrontent ce samedi 18 juillet 2026 pour la 3e place de la Coupe du monde, la petite finale, qui n'a peut-être pas la saveur d'une finale, mais qui reste un dernier rendez-vous entre deux grandes nations du football. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir : l'horaire, les chaînes et comment regarder le match gratuitement ou avec beIN Sports. ...

item.title: 'We can no longer afford to be blind': Danish startup raises funds to build underwater CCTV-like tech to track drones and more
item.description: Three engineering students raise €1 million to string AI-powered listening posts across the seabed.

item.title: OnePlus quitte l’Europe : la rédaction de Frandroid raconte ses souvenirs les plus marquants
item.description: OnePlus quitte l'Europe et l'Amérique du Nord après douze ans de présence dans l'Hexagone. Avant de définitivement tourner la page, plusieurs journalistes de la rédaction ont accepté de revenir sur ce qui les a marqués chez OnePlus, d'un smartphone culte à une publicité un poil forceuse qui restera dans les annales.

item.title: 700 escrocs, 20 centres d’appels : ce réseau criminel a fait des dizaines de milliers de victimes
item.description: La police vient de démanteler un vaste réseau criminel spécialisé dans les arnaques aux faux investissements. Baptisée « Operation Sunflower », l'enquête a duré près de quatre ans et s'est soldée par l'arrestation d'une série de criminels dans différents pays.

item.title: FIFA Doesn’t Have a Plan to Deal With Climate Change
item.description: This year’s World Cup has faced sweltering heat and humidity. Now it may need to deal with wildfire smoke.

item.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
item.description: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.

item.title: The Google Pixel Watch 5 leaks just keep coming, with details and renders everywhere — here's what's likely in store for the Android smartwatch
item.description: Google Pixel Watch 5: purported leaks of prices, renders, colors and more have hit the internet.

item.title: It’s Google Maps—but for pinball
item.description: Meet your new retro-tech treasure map. If there’s one universally beloved form of nostalgia-inducing retro tech, it’s pinball.

item.title: A material in Spanish World Cup star Pedri’s cleats could also repair your colon
item.description: A microstructure technology designed by an engineer at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign is making strides on and off the pitch. When Spanish midfielder Pedri zips across the field this Sunday, microscopic pillars on the Nanostrike+ fabric of his Adidas Predator cleats will help him control the ball.

item.title: The World Cup tech innovations that will outlast the tournament
item.description: From AI-assisted refereeing and antidrone systems to ticketing headaches and place-specific design, the 2026 tournament offered a preview of what’s next for sports, travel, and live events. The FIFA World Cup comes to a close on Sunday, as Spain and Argentina face off for the championship. The tournament’s scale is difficult to overstate: More than 75% of the world’s population was expected to engage with it in some way, whether by attending matches, watching on TV, or following online, according to Bank of America Global Research data....

item.title: If U.S. home prices fell 16%, it’d restore housing market affordability to the long-run average
item.description: Here’s the math on how far each one of the key housing affordability levers—all else equal—would need to shift to restore national housing affordability. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: The new Trump accounts for kids: The good, the bad, and the icky
item.description: Here’s how to take advantage of Trump’s eponymous tax-advantaged investment account for U.S. citizens under 18. How much money parents can invest in their kids is one of the biggest factors in upward mobility. The inability of many families to provide their children a financial leg up has helped drive income inequality in the United States. There is now a partial solution, offered by the last person I’d have expected to address America’s income inequality problem: Donald Trump....

item.title: The best air purifiers for wildfire smoke tested: Our faves from Blueair, Coway Airmega, Shark, and more
item.description: An air purifier is a non-negotiable for us, especially during wildfire season. Here are our top air purifiers for smoke, pet dander, and odors.
